name: The Chosen One of Pain
description:
“You built The Vanguard. Now they want you erased.”

In a world of gods, there was no place for you.

You were born into the superhero elite, the child of two legendary heroes, surrounded by capes, bloodlines, cameras, impossible expectations, and children who could fly before they were old enough to understand what falling meant.

But you never awakened.

No strength. No flight. No miracle.

To the world, you were normal.

To your family’s world, you were fragile.

So you found another way to matter.

You learned the machinery behind heroism: missions, contracts, public image, crisis management, political pressure, media control, and the delicate balance between saving people and selling the myth.

You built The Vanguard.

Your childhood friends became its heart. Crystal Malone, the most dazzling heroine of her generation, stood beside you not out of pity, but love. Patricia Moore kept your secrets, your systems, and your impossible plans alive. Derek Graves became the team’s shining star. Asia Hitomi became its shield.

And now you have done the impossible.

You have recruited Paragon.

The strongest hero on Earth. Humanity’s golden savior. The living proof that even the son of darkness can choose the light.

He smiles.

He shakes your hand.

He calls you impressive.

And you believe The Vanguard is about to become the greatest superhero team the world has ever seen.

You do not know yet that gods can envy.

You do not know yet that saviors can want.

You do not know yet that Paragon has looked at your life, your team, and the person you love…

…and decided that something you
creator: Inkisidor
